title: Roasted Light Korean Chicken Roast
description: A lazy Sunday Korean dish featuring pandan leaf and a mother sauce base, this recipe is onion and garlic free, making it perfect for those with dietary restrictions.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine soy sauce, honey, ginger paste, and sesame oil to make the mother sauce.
Place the chicken thighs in a large bowl and brush the mother sauce all over them.
Wrap each chicken thigh with a pandan leaf, securing with a toothpick if needed.
Season the chicken with salt and black pepper.
Place the chicken in a roasting pan and pour in the water.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 45 minutes.
Baste the chicken with the pan juices and continue roasting for an additional 20 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the oven and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
